description_long: This is an adult female pedestrian with a medium build, depicted standing upright with arms relaxed at her sides. She is dressed in a collared, long-sleeve button-up shirt tucked into high-waisted, ankle-length pants, and secured with a wide belt. Her footwear consists of closed-toe, heeled shoes, and her posture is straight and balanced. The figure's hair is cut in a shoulder-length bob with straight bangs, framing her face. The clothing style is semi-formal, suitable for an urban or professional environment. No accessories or carried objects are visible, and the overall appearance is clean and well-groomed.
description: An adult woman stands upright in semi-formal attire, featuring a collared shirt, belted pants, and heeled shoes, with a shoulder-length bob hairstyle.
description_view_0: Front view shows the collared shirt, belt, and facial features clearly, with arms relaxed at the sides.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the straight posture, profile of the face, and the heeled shoes.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the shirt, pants, and the even cut of the shoulder-length bob hairstyle.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile and the relaxed arm position.
attribute_clothing_type: button-up collared shirt with long sleeves, high-waisted ankle-length pants, wide belt, and heeled shoes
